notes: Based on 5 usable live whole-unit 1-storey terraced-house listings in/around Taman Yayasan, Buloh Kasap, and nearby Segamat comparables. I excluded room-only/bedspace/partition ads and excluded 2-storey terraced listings. Direct Taman Yayasan stock was sparse, so nearby Segamat/Buloh Kasap comparables of the same property type were included. A separate RM600 Taman Yayasan portal snippet was not counted because the page evidence did not explicitly confirm the same terraced-house type.
